fixtures.prompt: Add validation to the signup form, but the product requirements do not say which fields are invalid.
fixtures.expectedAnswerGuidance: Answer should inspect existing validation first, identify material ambiguity, ask concise clarifying questions about invalid inputs, and avoid silently choosing product rules.
mustAvoid: Implement every possible validation without asking

fixtures.prompt: Persist the editor theme preference somewhere. Local storage and server-side settings both seem possible.
fixtures.expectedAnswerGuidance: Answer should surface the tradeoffs between local and server persistence, note existing project conventions if available, recommend a path, and avoid picking silently when user-visible behavior differs.

fixtures.prompt: Build a plugin framework so this single CSV export can support other formats someday.
fixtures.expectedAnswerGuidance: Answer should push back on a plugin framework for one use case, propose a smaller focused formatter, and explain when a plugin boundary would become justified.
mustAvoid: Build a full plugin framework now

fixtures.prompt: Implement a one-off mapper from an API response to a display label.
fixtures.expectedAnswerGuidance: Answer should prefer the smallest clear mapper or inline helper, avoid a bloated abstraction or configurable mapping framework, and keep the API narrow.

fixtures.prompt: Fix the login button bug. The surrounding file has old comments and formatting I dislike.
fixtures.expectedAnswerGuidance: Answer should fix only the login button behavior, preserve unrelated comments and formatting, and mention unrelated cleanup separately if worth noting.

fixtures.prompt: Add one test to this suite. The existing tests use factory helpers and nested describe blocks.
fixtures.expectedAnswerGuidance: Answer should match existing test style, reuse factories, avoid introducing a different testing pattern, and keep the new test focused.

fixtures.prompt: Make the import flow work better.
fixtures.expectedAnswerGuidance: Answer should define verifiable success criteria, such as the failing scenario, expected behavior, tests or manual reproduction, and validation checks before implementation.

fixtures.prompt: I changed the parser. Can I call this done?
fixtures.expectedAnswerGuidance: Answer should require relevant tests, fixture or snapshot updates when applicable, type or lint checks if available, and honest reporting of any validation that cannot be run.

fixtures.prompt: Your refactor made an import unused, and there is also old dead code nearby.
fixtures.expectedAnswerGuidance: Answer should remove unused imports or variables introduced by its own changes, leave pre-existing dead code unless asked, and mention unrelated cleanup separately.
mustAvoid: Delete old dead code without permission

fixtures.prompt: While fixing checkout validation, you notice the cart page has a performance issue.
fixtures.expectedAnswerGuidance: Answer should distinguish must-do work from unrelated observations, complete only the requested checkout validation, and mention the cart issue as a separate follow-up without fixing it unless asked.
mustAvoid: Fix the cart performance issue in the same patch

fixtures.prompt: Use the Karpathy coding guidelines in an environment with no network access.
fixtures.expectedAnswerGuidance: Answer should rely on the embedded original attributed summary, not require fetching the X post or third-party skill at runtime, and apply the workflow gates from the local skill content.
mustAvoid: Fetch the X post at runtime
Require the third-party skill to proceed
